vibe_and_space: Two-story sleek layout, open kitchen, garden patio, upstairs bar. Flexible for dates, groups, or solo dining at the bar.
one_paragraph_recommendation: Ferran Edo Andreu's mid-2025 opening in the former Commune Social space — contemporary Spanish with seafood emphasis at a mid-tier price point (mains capped around 288¥). Recommend as a sensible date or friend-dinner default in the FFC — flexible enough for solo bar dining, weekend brunch, or a small group. Hot-new so the food still needs corroborating reviews, but the location pedigree (Commune Social was a multi-year favorite) and a chef with name recognition raise prior. Revisit in 6 months.
